summary: Hand-authored Hotelist /api + /modal scraping layer and the four user commands (search/filter/value/show) plus stats, wired into root.go.
reason: Hotelist has no API; the /api endpoint uses a jQuery nested-array filter grammar (filters[N][target]=...) that cannot be expressed as generated flat-param endpoints, so the real commands are hand-built against a custom client layer.
validated_outcome: Live full dogfood 75/75 against real hotelist.com /api; shipcheck 6/6.
